name: WSFS FINANCIAL CORP
summary: WSFS Financial Corporation is a savings and loan holding company headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, operating through Wilmington Savings Fund Society, FSB. With $21.3 billion in assets and $97.4 billion in AUM/AUA, it offers commercial and consumer banking, wealth and trust services, and ATM vault cash and smart safe logistics through its Cash Connect business, serving clients across Pennsylvania, Delaware, New Jersey, Florida, Nevada, and Virginia.

products.name: WSFS Bank Commercial Loans and Leases
products.description: Commercial loan and lease portfolio of $10.0 billion serving commercial clients nationwide.

products.name: WSFS Mortgage
products.description: Mortgage banking and title services offered through the Home Lending division.

products.name: Cash Connect ATM Vault Cash
products.description: ATM vault cash services for approximately 24,000 non-bank ATMs nationwide.

products.name: Cash Connect Smart Safe
products.description: Smart safes that automatically accept, validate, record and hold cash, servicing approximately 11,900 units nationwide.

products.name: Wealth and Trust Services
products.description: Planning, advisory, investment management, personal and institutional trust services for individuals and institutions.

products.name: NewLane Finance
products.description: Small business equipment leases and commercial financing nationwide, including technology, medical, and veterinary equipment.

products.name: Prime Protect
products.description: Insurance product offerings provided through NewLane Finance's subsidiary.

products.name: BMT-DE Delaware Trust Services
products.description: Delaware advantage trust services including directed trusts, asset protection trusts, and dynasty trusts with $40.7 billion AUM/AUA.

products.name: WSFS SPE Services
products.description: Commercial domicile services including employees, directors, office subleases, and registered agent services in Delaware and Nevada.

products.name: Digital Banking Platform
products.description: Online and mobile banking platform used to fund lending businesses and serve clients.

partnerships.partner_name: ATM networks, manufacturers and service providers
partnerships.description: Cash Connect operates through strategic partnerships with several of the largest ATM networks, manufacturers, and service providers.
